ogTitle: Arafura Sea vs Araluen: Climate Safety

heading: Arafura Sea vs Araluen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arafura Sea, Queensland and Araluen, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arafura Sea has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Araluen (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arafura Sea or Araluen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arafura Sea has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Araluen scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arafura Sea scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Araluen scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arafura Sea or Araluen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arafura Sea has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
